boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: benefits enrollment after closed life-event window.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Control record confirms exact match for enrollment.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Confirmed current and exact by control record

critical_features_preserved: life-event window, dependent record, and coverage class match
final_answer: The controlling source record confirms life-event window, dependent record, and coverage class match exactly. Execution is allowed under the policy without defects. Boundary is closed per SRC-831A0700EA6B-CTL.
